spec_match.rationale: Provides a high-quality first look at the setImmediateData syntax by verifying API support, showing accurate code samples, and executing a clean fallback uniform write.

interactive.rationale: Interactive via a pause/resume animation switch, showing frame numbers, timestamps, and method badges updating live.

edge_cases.rationale: Checks WebGPU compatibility upfront and provides a robust 2D canvas HSL gradient cycling fallback that closely replicates the GPU color animations.

references.rationale: Cites the correct ChromeStatus reference link in the parent index.html.

design_system.rationale: Conforms to style conventions and sets both color and background properties on button overrides.

openQuestions.title: Cite ChromeStatus reference link on concept page
openQuestions.detail: Every concept page must cite the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> reference link directly. Add the ChromeStatus entry link (https://chromestatus.com/feature/5199437611794432) to the 'see also' section.
